title: Monthly Data on India’s International Trade in Services for the Month of March 2026
description: The values of exports and imports of services during March 2026 are presented in the following table. International Trade in Services (US$ million) Month Receipts (Exports) Payments (Imports) January – 2026 38,165 (9.8) 16,631 (-0.5) February – 2026 34,708 (9.7) 16,865 (16.2) March – 2026 38,208 (7.2) 17,210 (-1.6) Note: (i) Data for January-March are provisional; and (ii) Figures in parentheses are growth rates over the corresponding month of the previous year, which have been
